name: White Bandage
flavor: A little strip of hope. Mostly adhesive.

name: Green Bandage
flavor: Better than white. Still applied with panic.

name: Blue Bandage
flavor: Professional-looking enough to inspire misplaced confidence.

name: Purple Bandage
flavor: Premium medical tape for premium mistakes.

name: Panic Paddles
flavor: Two questionable paddles and one laminated apology. For when 'walk it off' has lost the debate.
